message:
fix(replay): correct test values in performance budget classify tests (ft-og6q6.7.3)

Two tests used metric values that violated absolute budgets, causing the
budget check to fire before the regression classification they intended
to verify. Fix by using values within budget that still trigger the
targeted regression thresholds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
